I have two things to about your ring:

Donbayne 100 Rng - Uinian 100 Dru - Breru 100 Sk - Nyenie 82 Brd - Ruusan 76 Clr - Braru 75 Mag - Syqen 100 Shm EQ Stromm/Luclin
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Apr 17 2003 at 3:38 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTF BETTER???
this ring needs HPs
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2003 at 2:15 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781123020
44 posts
Sad to say but the regald band from Chardok is far better than this ring just because of raw hp of 85 it gives, and the sad thing it is a hell of lot easier to get. So easy it can be solo done if you get lucky with AG spawn. Where this ring needs a raid force to get and the mob that drops has about the life span as AG too because of the ST key. In order for this ring to be better than regal band it needs at least 40hps added to it. Sad though cause the stats are right on the money for a ranger too str sta even the wis. With my ranger ( half elf ) im trying to find ways of sneaking up my wisdom without sacrificing hp sta. and this ring would have done nicely if it gave HPs. With the high demands of SoP, SoT, CoR, for a raid force as im usally the only ranger in guild thats raiding all the time. Or soloing in PoP using brushfire, and frozenwind to help the bordom of just plinking the target with arrows my mana pool dries up fast so rangers do need wis just not as high priority as cleric. druid, shaman
▲ Page top
RE: this ring needs HPs
QuoteReply
# Sep 19 2003 at 9:45 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591758961202
60 posts
i love how people post like this, you think a raid will come to this zone JUST for this item? you think you will goto a raid JUST to win a chance to roll on this? hehe. i'm not a ranger, and i really dont want to be, but if this drops i'd roll on it. oh yeah, and rangers have 2 fingers, which means 2 rings. hehe i know cause everytime i tell rangers they suck they show me their two fingers :)

Garbage
QuoteReply
# Oct 10 2002 at 2:20 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592255864093
216 posts
Well between the time you get this ring and cap your stamina with shaman buffs its better then a 6 ac 65hp. (which fyi wont be very long)

Personally Id much rather go with Ring of Flowing Slime from Cazic Thule (8 ac 10 sta 15 str 55hp 35 mana) and 9th/10th ring of coldain (Depending where your guild stands on the quest)

Same goes for Str, this ring is junk sadly.
Oh...any Ranger who says that its good because of the wisdom on it...im going to ********* you.

Nice corpse run armor I guess.
Ie: Verrant needs to re-do half the NtoV loot, much better is now attaineable from same tier mobs in Luclin. And even exp camps in dungeons.

This ring rocks

# Aug 20 2001 at 1:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757559383
1 post
My guild dropped Lend today and guess what I got? I had been wearing a 6ac/65hp ring. the 15sta turned into 63hp (net drop of 2) and my base ac increased by 14.

It is a damn nice ring.

Shadowed Soul

Well as i have noticed a lot of these high end items have very low or 0 weight which i think is more so a benifit of getting to a level where you can obtain such things it gives less weight to carry in armor and weapons so that you can carry out more of those nice items that drop not to mention the huge sacks of cash that you would be holding after a big raid on some of these high level dungeons.
